description:
You have just joined the team as a localisation engineer.  
        The repository has a very small demo i18n tree located under  

            /home/user/project/

        Goal: consolidate the latest template /home/user/project/locale/templates/app.pot
        into every existing *.po file in the locale/ tree, using a clean Python
        virtual-environment that you must create with the stdlib module “venv”.

        1) Virtual-environment  
           • It must be created at  
                 /home/user/project/locale-env  
           • After creation you have to activate it and install EXACTLY  
                 polib==1.2.0  

        2) Helper script  
           • Inside /home/user/project/ write a script named update_translations.py  
           • The script shall:  
             a) Walk through every file matching */LC_MESSAGES/*.po that lives
                under /home/user/project/locale/  
             b) Merge each *.po file with the template
                   /home/user/project/locale/templates/app.pot  
                so that any msgid that exists in the template but is missing
                from the *.po file is appended with an **empty** msgstr.  
             c) Count how many translation entries (non-header) existed in the
                *.po before the merge and how many exist after the merge.  
             d) Write a log file in the **exact** format shown below.  
           • The script must be executable.

        3) Logging  
           • Create /home/user/project/update_log.txt  
           • Write one block per processed *.po file, separated by a line that
             contains three dashes (“---”).  
           • A block MUST follow the template below verbatim
             (angle-brackets included, no extra spaces, one item per line):

                <file> ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_PO </file>
                added: MSG_NEW
                count_before: X
                count_after: Y
                ---

             where X and Y are the integer counts you obtained.  
             For this particular repository X will always be 1 and Y will always
             be 2, so your log should look **exactly** as in the example in the
             comments of the truth section (case, spacing and punctuation must
             match so the automated checker can diff it).

        4) Verification hints  
           • The automated tests will:  
             – Open /home/user/project/update_log.txt and diff its content
               byte-for-byte against the expected blocks.  
             – Inspect /home/user/project/locale/en_US/LC_MESSAGES/app.po and  
               /home/user/project/locale/fr_FR/LC_MESSAGES/app.po to make sure  
               they now contain a msgid "MSG_NEW" with an empty msgstr "".  
             – Confirm that /home/user/project/locale-env exists, that its
               bin/activate script is present, and that polib 1.2.0 is installed.

        Perform every action from the terminal, demonstrating the full,
        sequential workflow of a localisation engineer.
truth:
The repository is pre-populated with the following three files
        BEFORE the agent starts:

        1) /home/user/project/locale/templates/app.pot
        -------------------------------------------------------------------
        msgid ""
        msgstr ""
        "Project-Id-Version: app 1.0\n"
        "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"

        #: src/main.py:10
        msgid "HELLO_WORLD"
        msgstr "Hello, World!"

        #: src/main.py:20
        msgid "MSG_NEW"
        msgstr "A new message"
        -------------------------------------------------------------------

        2) /home/user/project/locale/en_US/LC_MESSAGES/app.po
        -------------------------------------------------------------------
        msgid ""
        msgstr ""
        "Project-Id-Version: app 1.0\n"
        "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"

        #: src/main.py:10
        msgid "HELLO_WORLD"
        msgstr "Hello, World!"
        -------------------------------------------------------------------

        3) /home/user/project/locale/fr_FR/LC_MESSAGES/app.po
        -------------------------------------------------------------------
        msgid ""
        msgstr ""
        "Project-Id-Version: app 1.0\n"
        "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"

        #: src/main.py:10
        msgid "HELLO_WORLD"
        msgstr "Bonjour, Monde!"
        -------------------------------------------------------------------

        AFTER the agent finishes, the following state MUST be true:

        A) Directory /home/user/project/locale-env exists and contains an
           executable python in its bin directory; “pip show polib” inside that
           venv returns Version: 1.2.0.

        B) /home/user/project/update_translations.py exists, is executable
           (chmod 755), and can be run with the venv’s python.

        C) /home/user/project/update_log.txt exists with the following exact
           eight lines (note the terminating --- after the second block):

           <file> /home/user/project/locale/en_US/LC_MESSAGES/app.po </file>
           added: MSG_NEW
           count_before: 1
           count_after: 2
           ---
           <file> /home/user/project/locale/fr_FR/LC_MESSAGES/app.po </file>
           added: MSG_NEW
           count_before: 1
           count_after: 2
           ---

        D) The final contents of each *.po:

           1) /home/user/project/locale/en_US/LC_MESSAGES/app.po
           -------------------------------------------------------------------
           msgid ""
           msgstr ""
           "Project-Id-Version: app 1.0\n"
           "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"

           #: src/main.py:10
           msgid "HELLO_WORLD"
           msgstr "Hello, World!"

           #: src/main.py:20
           msgid "MSG_NEW"
           msgstr ""
           -------------------------------------------------------------------

           2) /home/user/project/locale/fr_FR/LC_MESSAGES/app.po
           -------------------------------------------------------------------
           msgid ""
           msgstr ""
           "Project-Id-Version: app 1.0\n"
           "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"

           #: src/main.py:10
           msgid "HELLO_WORLD"
           msgstr "Bonjour, Monde!"

           #: src/main.py:20
           msgid "MSG_NEW"
           msgstr ""
           -------------------------------------------------------------------
